requests.original_question: What are the years and names of trials that studied Pembrolizumab for Melanoma in phase 3?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Year", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Pembrolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

requests.original_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

requests.original_question: What are the study details, including the primary endpoint, for Urothelial cancer trials testing immune checkpoint inhibitors plus chemotherapy?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Primary endpoint" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+Chemo';

requests.original_question: Find Phase 3 Durvalumab trials for Small Cell Lung Cancer that are follow-up publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3';

requests.original_question: Show trials for Melanoma using PD1 that did not require PD-L1 positivity for inclusion?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

requests.original_question: Find Small Cell Lung cancer trials that do not require PD-L1 positivity for inclusion?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';

requests.original_question: For Melanoma trials, what is the minimum follow-up time by treatment arm?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Type of follow-up given" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Minimum';

requests.original_question: Find the trial identifiers and names of immune checkpoint inhibitors for Small Cell Lung cancer in Phase 3 trials that are original publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab, Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

requests.original_question: Find Phase 3 Durvalumab trials for non-small cell lung cancer that were follow-up publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

requests.original_question: Which trials of Atezolizumab for Colorectal cancer used a multikinase inhibitor as the control?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

requests.original_question: Find Durvalumab trials for Urothelial cancer that are original publications in Phase 2?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

requests.original_question: Find Breast cancer trials with at least 2 prior lines of therapy that used monotherapy?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 2 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy';

requests.original_question: Which trials for pancreatic cancer evaluated Ipilimumab in phase 2, and what are the trial names and original publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Pancreatic' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2';

requests.original_question: Which trials used an antibody-drug conjugate as a control arm?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Control arm" = 'Antibody-drug conjugate';

requests.original_question: Which trials studied Durvalumab and Tremelimumab for Small Cell Lung Cancer?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung';

requests.original_question: Which trials studied Ipilimumab for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';

requests.original_question: Find Hodgkin Lymphoma trials?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma';

requests.original_question: Find Small Cell Lung cancer trials and show the follow-up duration in months for each treatment arm?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Type of follow-up given", "Cancer type", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Rx", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung';

requests.original_question: Find Renal cell cancer trials with 2 or more prior therapies that used a single agent?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 2 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Monotherapy';

requests.original_question: Find the identifiers and publication status of Phase 3 Atezolizumab trials for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer that are follow-up publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Originial publication or Follow-up" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Atezolizumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

requests.original_question: Which trials for Mesothelioma used a placebo as the control arm and what phase were they in?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Control arm", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Control arm" = 'Placebo';

requests.original_question: Find Phase 3 chemotherapy trials for head and neck cancer that are follow-up publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck';

requests.original_question: Find Phase 3 trials of Durvalumab or Tremelimumab for gastric or gastroesophageal junction cancer that are follow-up publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';

requests.original_question: Find Phase 2 clinical trials for colorectal cancer using Durvalumab and Tremelimumab that were originally published?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 2' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

requests.original_question: Find the author and control arm follow-up duration in months for Urothelial cancer trials reporting median follow-up?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Type of follow-up given" = 'Median';

requests.original_question: List trials for esophageal or gastroesophageal junction cancer where the overall follow-up period was more than 10.6 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 10.6;

requests.original_question: Find trials of Durvalumab for Urothelial cancer that are Phase 3 and are original publications?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Urothelial' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';

requests.original_question: List the author and immunotherapy drug for non-small cell lung cancer trials using durvalumab with overall follow-up longer than 21 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

requests.original_question: Show trials for hepatocellular cancer that used combination treatment and included patients with at least 1 prior line of therapy?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Lines of treatment", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Type of combination", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hepatocellular' AND "Lines of treatment" >= 1 AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

requests.original_question: List the year and cancer type for breast cancer trials using chemotherapy where overall follow-up was more than 21 months?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Year", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Breast' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Chemotherapy' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

requests.original_question: Show the author and year for Non-Small Cell Lung cancer trials testing CTLA-4 that began in 2018 or later?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung' AND "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Year" >= 2018;

requests.original_question: Show the author and year for melanoma trials that used immune checkpoint inhibitors plus a vaccine?
requests.gt_sql: SELECT "Author", "Year" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Type of combination" = 'ICI+Vaccine';
